title: Reckless Romance
writer: Joseph Farnham, Emil Nyitray, F. McGrew Willis
actors: T. Roy Barnes, Harry Myers, Wanda Hawley
plot: Jerry Warner falls in love with Edith Somers but cannot obtain her father's permission to marry her. Jerry is given $10,000 by his uncle, however, and makes a proposition to Edith's father: if Jerry can retain the money for 30 day...
